title: Generator harness + validation script + Croissant emitter
context: The project's reproducible synthetic-data production pipeline requires three connected tools: (1) a generator harness that takes a parameter file + fixed seed and emits a data file + provenance.json deterministically; (2) a validation script that checks documentation completeness (target >= 90/100) and safety notice presence; and (3) a Croissant ML v1.0 metadata emitter that reads the canonical metadata object and emits valid JSON-LD. These tools must ship with committed golden test fixtures so 'CI green' is meaningful: determinism tests (same seed => identical bytes), known-valid + malformed Croissant fixtures, and validation script golden input/report pairs. Depends on template-001 (canonical model) and synthesis-004 (generation methodology spec).
objective: Implement and merge the reproducible generator harness, dataset validation script, and Croissant ML metadata emitter, with CI golden fixtures proving determinism and validity.
acceptanceCriteria: Generator harness accepts a parameter file (each param with provenance) and a fixed RNG seed, emits a data file + provenance.json, and is deterministic: same seed + params => identical bytes.
Validation script checks documentation completeness scoring (0-100, target >= 90) and verifies the mandatory safety notice is present on each artifact; emits a committed quality report.

Croissant ML v1.0 emitter reads the canonical metadata object and emits valid JSON-LD; validated against the Croissant spec with a known-valid golden fixture and a deliberately-malformed golden fixture (rejected correctly).
CI exercises: generator determinism test (same seed => identical bytes), validation-script golden input => report pair, Croissant emitter with valid + malformed fixtures.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; no credentials or API keys committed; code licensed MIT; commit DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md (§Solution — Synthetic generation harness; §Quality — Test fixtures & golden files)
output: A merged PR adding the generator harness, validation script, and Croissant emitter to the project repo, with CI golden fixtures green.
